services.title: Fresh Ingredients
services.desc: We use only locally sourced, farm-fresh ingredients every single day.

services.title: Fast Delivery
services.desc: Hot meals delivered to your door in under 40 minutes, guaranteed.

services.title: Homemade Taste
services.desc: Every dish is prepared with love, just like mom used to make.

services.title: Healthy Options
services.desc: Nutritious, balanced meals crafted by our in-house nutritionist.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: The food feels exactly like home-cooked meals. Dal Makhani is absolutely divine. Been ordering 3 times a week!

testimonials.name: Rohit Mehta
testimonials.text: Super fast delivery and the biryani is packed with flavour. Best tiffin service in Mumbai, hands down.

testimonials.name: Sneha Patel
testimonials.text: Love the healthy options and the fresh ingredients. You can actually taste the difference. Highly recommend!
